summary: Audience (FOB) tape captures a solid Dead show – the first set is hampered by a whistling fan, but the remainder shines with clear, sweet‑spot sound.
review: The recording is an audience (FOB) capture that delivers good clarity once past the noisy opening; reviewers note a whistle in the first set that detracts from an otherwise strong performance. The band’s playing is described as “above par” and “stellar” after the early interruption, making the show enjoyable despite the minor flaw.

ai_rating.rationale: Three of four reviewers gave 4‑star ratings praising performance and recording quality, while one gave a neutral 3‑star rating; the main drawback is first‑set whistle noise, so overall rating sits at solid good.

recording_quality.technical_notes: First set suffers from whistling/interference from a fan; rest of the tape sounds clear and well‑balanced when recorded from the sweet spot.

show_quality.setlist_flow: First set is marred by an annoying whistle but improves in the second set where performance is described as above par; overall flow considered solid once past the initial issue.
